source.fields: defense/shot/attack/speed are unsigned bytes at 0x1a4..0x1a7. typeCode (0x1a0) is the borg-type enum (0=long range, 1=short range, 2=speed, 3=almighty, 4=support). airJump (0x1a3) is the raw air-jump count byte: N for 'Air jump level N' borgs, 0 for 'Boost jump' borgs, 0xff observed for most 'N/A' flyers.
